# Jesse Alexander Books

> Jesse Alexander is a multi-genre MM romance author writing fantasy, regency,
> paranormal, and futuristic romance — emotional, character-driven stories where
> heart and heat go hand in hand and love always finds a way. All books are
> available on Amazon and free to read on Kindle Unlimited. The Heartlines
> newsletter delivers free stories and release news.

## Books

- [The Space Between](https://jessealexanderbooks.com/the-space-between.html): Hot Lemonade series book 1. MM paranormal romance — a fire elemental and a frost elemental who can't touch without risking destruction. Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FHFJ5VS8
- [Forbidden Fruit](https://jessealexanderbooks.com/forbidden-fruit.html): Hot Lemonade series book 2. MM paranormal romance — stepbrother incubi, fated mates, a second chance at a supernatural hookup bar. Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GJNG5XVZ
- [The Duke's Christmas Consort](https://jessealexanderbooks.com/the-dukes-christmas-consort.html): standalone MM fantasy regency holiday romance — a fake consort, a week of Christmas festivities, a duke's world turned topsy-turvy. Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BLSV1HH6

## Coming soon

- Wolfsbane: Mate or Madness book 1, an MM fated mates romance.
- Dragon Soul: a steamy MM dragon shifter romance.
- The Gambit: an alpha/omega fantasy space opera romance.
